==Pokémon==
This listing is of Lusamine's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{missingInfo|2|java|enva}}
===On hand===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Lilligant
|gender=female
|type1=Grass
|img=Lusamine Lilligant.png
|epnum=SM053
|epname=Rescuing the Unwilling!
|vaen=Michele Knotz
|desc={{p|Lilligant}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. She has owned her since {{an|Gladion}} and {{an|Lillie}} were young. She first made cameo appearances in a photograph in ''[[SM008|Lillie's Egg-xhilarating Challenge!]]'' and ''[[SM027|A Glaring Rivalry!]]'', alongside Lusamine, Lusamine's {{p|Lillipup}} and {{p|Cleffa}} and a young Lillie and Gladion.

She first made her physical appearance while under Nihilego's control in ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', where Lusamine sent her out to battle against {{an|Lana}}, {{an|Mallow}}, {{an|Sophocles}}, their Pokémon, and {{Ash}}'s {{AP|Rowlet}} and {{AP|Litten}}. She was defeated by Litten's {{m|Fire Fang}} in ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', but Nihilego made her get back up and continue battling. Lilligant was freed from Nihilego's influence upon the Ultra Beast's defeat.

Lilligant's known moves are {{m|Petal Dance}}, {{m|Teeter Dance}}, {{m|Sweet Scent}}, and {{m|Solar Beam}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Salazzle
|gender=female
|type1=Poison
|type2=Fire
|img=Lusamine Salazzle.png
|epnum=SM053
|epname=Rescuing the Unwilling!
|vaen=Haven Paschall
|desc={{p|Salazzle}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. She first appeared under Nihilego's control in ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', where Lusamine sent her out to battle against {{an|Kiawe}}, his {{TP|Kiawe|Turtonator}}, and his {{TP|Kiawe|Marowak}}. She was eventually defeated by a combination of Turtonator's {{m|Inferno Overdrive}} and Marowak's {{m|Bonemerang}}. In ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', however, Nihilego made her get back up and continue battling until the Ultra Beast was defeated, freeing her from its control.

None of Salazzle's moves are known.<!--Salazzle's only known move is {{m|Sludge Wave}}.--><!--Do NOT assume the moves. Only add them if they have been EXPLICITLY said.-->}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine

|type1=Water

|epnum=SM053
|epname=Rescuing the Unwilling!
|desc={{p|Milotic}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. It first appeared while under Nihilego's control in ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', where Lusamine sent it out to battle against {{an|Lana}}, {{an|Mallow}}, {{an|Sophocles}}, their Pokémon, and {{Ash}}'s {{AP|Rowlet}} and {{AP|Litten}}. It was defeated by a combination of {{TP|Sophocles|Togedemaru}}'s {{m|Zing Zap}} and {{TP|Sophocles|Charjabug}}'s {{m|Discharge}} in ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', but Nihilego made it get back up and continue battling. Milotic was freed from Nihilego's influence upon the Ultra Beast's defeat.

Milotic's known moves are {{m|Hydro Pump}} and {{m|Aqua Tail}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Mismagius
|type1=Ghost

|epnum=SM053
|epname=Rescuing the Unwilling!

|desc={{p|Mismagius}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. It first appeared while under Nihilego's control in ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', where Lusamine sent it out to battle against {{an|Lana}}, {{an|Mallow}}, {{an|Sophocles}}, their Pokémon, and {{Ash}}'s {{AP|Rowlet}} and {{AP|Litten}}. It was defeated by {{TP|Lana|Popplio}}'s {{m|Hydro Vortex}} in ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', but Nihilego made it get back up and continue battling. Mismagius was freed from Nihilego's influence upon the Ultra Beast's defeat.

Mismagius's only known move is {{m|Thunderbolt}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Absol
|type1=Dark
|img=Lusamine Absol.png
|epnum=SM053
|epname=Rescuing the Unwilling!
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Absol}} is one of Lusamine's Pokémon. It has history with {{an|Gladion}}, and used to be a sparring partner for his {{p|Umbreon}}. It first appeared while under Lusamine's control in ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', where Lusamine sent it out to battle against Gladion, his {{p|Silvally}}, {{p|Lycanroc}}, and Umbreon. It was defeated by Lycanroc's {{m|Continental Crush}} in ''[[SM054|10,000,000 Reasons to Fight]]'', but Nihilego made it get back up and continue battling. Absol was freed from Nihilego's influence upon the Ultra Beast's defeat, recognizing and happily reuniting with Umbreon.

Absol's known moves are {{m|Psycho Cut}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, and {{m|Mean Look}}.}}

===At the Ultra Guardians base===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Clefable
|type1=Fairy
|stage1=Cleffa
|stage2=Clefairy
|gender=female
|main=yes
|img=Lusamine Clefable.png
|epnum=SM044
|epname=A Dream Encounter!
|vajp=Megumi Hayashibara
|vaen=Kate Bristol
|vaennote=<small>[[SM050]]-[[SM078]]</small>
|vaen2=Sarah Natochenny
|vaen2note=<small>[[SM085]]-present</small>
|desc={{p|Clefable}} is Lusamine's first known Pokémon. She has owned her since she was a {{p|Cleffa}}, played with {{an|Gladion}} and {{an|Lillie}} when they were still young, and was a favorite playmate of Lillie. At some point, she evolved into {{p|Clefairy}}, and then Lusamine evolved her into Clefable with a [[Moon Stone]] against Lillie's wishes, as revealed in a fantasy in ''[[SM044|A Dream Encounter!]]''.

Clefable's first physical appearance was in ''[[SM050|Faba's Revenge!]]'', when Lusamine sent her out to battle a {{DL|Ultra Beasts (anime)|Nihilego}}. In ''[[SM053|Rescuing the Unwilling!]]'', she was used to battle Lillie, [[Snowy]], and [[Ash's Lycanroc]] while she and Lusamine were under Nihilego's control. She was stopped when Lillie helped Clefable remember the bond they shared, allowing her to break free from Nihilego's influence.

Starting in ''[[SM061|A Mission of Ultra Urgency!]]'', Clefable began to reside at the [[Ultra Guardians]] base below the [[Pokémon School]].}}

===At Aether Paradise===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lusamine
|pkmn=Herdier
|type1=Normal
|stage1=Lillipup
|img=Lillie family photo.png
|img2=Lusamine Herdier.png
|epnum=SM046
|epname=Deceiving Appearances!
|vaen=Marc Thompson
|desc={{p|Herdier}} is Lusamine's second known Pokémon. She has owned it since it was a {{p|Lillipup}} and played with {{an|Gladion}} and {{an|Lillie}} when they were still young. It first made cameo appearances as a Lillipup in a photograph in ''[[SM008|Lillie's Egg-xhilarating Challenge!]]'' and ''[[SM027|A Glaring Rivalry!]]'', alongside Lusamine, Lusamine's {{p|Cleffa}} and {{p|Lilligant}} and a young Lillie and Gladion. At some point, it evolved into Herdier. Herdier's first physical appearance was in ''[[SM046|Deceiving Appearances!]]'', where it was revealed that Lusamine keeps Herdier as company in her office in her [[Aether Paradise]] mansion. It appeared in a flashback in ''[[SM049|Mission: Total Recall!]]''.

None of Herdier's moves are known.}}
